payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: Capital Program Committee Meeting book including meeting minutes, Signals & Train Control update, Independent Engineering Consultant Project Review, M/WBE/DBE participation, Safety Summary, Commitments & Completions report, Traffic Light Report, and Procurement actions for June 2023.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Independent Engineering Consultant (IEC) for MTA Capital Program
Design, furnish and install CBTC system on the 8th Avenue Line from 59th Street in Manhattan to High Street Station in Brooklyn
Provides CBTC from Union Turnpike in Queens through 50 St/8 Av on the 53 St Line and 21 St/Queensbridge on the 63 St Line
Signal modernization between W 8 St and Church Av in Brooklyn including CBTC, new signal facilities and special track work
Provides CBTC systems from north of Union Turnpike to 179 St Station on the Queens Blvd (Hillside Av) Line (F)

payload.project_type: Communication Based Train Control - Design Build
payload.description: MTA's first Design-Build CBTC contract on the Crosstown Line (G) from Court Square in Queens to Church Avenue in Brooklyn
Purchase of R211 B-Division subway cars including base order of 535 cars ($1.75B) and Option 1 exercised for 640 additional cars ($3.67B total budget)

payload.raw_value_text: Twenty-nine (29) active projects in design and construction, valued at approximately $8.6 billion
102 active projects with a total budget of $2.3B

warnings: metric_claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids on metric payloads refer to route entities and should become explicit relations when supported. Suggested relation: route has_metric metric_claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: QBL West CBTC project has already placed CBTC into service on all sections, with the last section placed into operation February 2022
payload.statement: QBL West CBTC placed into service on all sections February 2022

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

payload.description: Capital Program Committee Meeting held at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY from 12:45 - 2:00 PM ET

tool_args.label: May 22, 2023 CPC Meeting Called to Order

payload.description: Chairman Lieber called the May 22, 2023 Capital Program Committee Meeting to order at 1:50 P.M.
2020-2024 Capital Program Contracts for nearly 700 buses across 6 fleet types with total budget over $570M
202 cars with $736M budget; Conditional Acceptance forecast for September 2023
27 locomotives including option with $414M EAC; Acceptance Completion forecast for April 2027
Design-build contract for Crosstown Line CBTC & 3 Interlockings including Bergen St Solid State Interlocking Replacement awarded to Crosstown Partners

payload.raw_value_text: 18 safety incidents were reported in May 2023, including: 3 lost time incidents, 4 recordable incidents
21 Lost Time incidents have been reported YTD (through May 31, 2023)

tool_args.label: QBL-W CBTC performance below contract requirements

payload.claim_text: The performance is still far below contract requirements. Further updates to Siemens software will occur in multiple waves this year to address shortfalls in availability and reliability targets.
The Systems BU was established in late 2022 and currently manages 102 active projects with a total budget of $2.3B

payload.raw_value_text: $1.714 billion versus a $2.041 billion YTD goal
$4,043 million versus its year-to-date goal of $5,456 million
13 actions for a proposed expenditure of $30.5 M

payload.description: Chairman Lieber adjourned the May 22, 2023 Capital Program Committee Meeting at 3:14 PM

payload.claim_text: The announcement from the Federal Government that the MTA is able to proceed with the Congestion Pricing Program unlocks the MTA ability to pursue such projects as Second Avenue Subway Phase 2, widespread ADA accessibility and signal modernization projects, rehabilitation of the Broadway Junction Station Complex, and continued focus on State of Good Repair status

payload.description: Project Management Consultant and designer for various MTA C&D CBTC projects
Rolling stock manufacturer for R211 subway cars and LIRR M-9 railcars
CBTC supplier and DCS radio supplier for multiple NYCT CBTC projects

tool_args.label: Michael Baker International is IEC for CBTC projects
